message:
test(widgets): Add comprehensive tests for Panel and Columns widgets (bd-10i.11)

Panel: 25 new tests covering inner() calculations, border rendering,
title/subtitle alignment (left/center/right), ellipsis truncation edge
cases, child rendering with padding and scissor guard, empty areas.

Columns: 6 new tests covering empty columns, zero area, single column,
fixed+fill layout, is_essential delegation, and constraint setter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
